description: Research habit app gamification mechanics - Finch and Forest

whatWorks: Virtual pet bird that grows with self-care tasks
No pressure or punishment for missing days
Free to use with optional upgrades
Part mood tracker, part daily planner, part journaling tool
finch.keyInsight: The app never pressures you or punishes you for missing a day - it's all gamification without guilt

whatWorks: Tree planting metaphor for focus sessions
Visual forest grows with each completed session
Tags for different types of focus/work
Low-stakes consequence (tree dies if you leave app)
forest.keyInsight: Every successfully completed focus session adds a new tree - accumulation without punishment

nextStep: Research more apps (Flora, Habitica) and design principles for long-term streaks
